title: Retame
description: Allows you to retame your pet with ease.
body:
With the command "**/retame**", you can retame your pet with ease.

![Retame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9cf6af63122b840b9758c6abcd86585304be476.png)

![Untame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/285e045e7596f7765b3f349f7e62ffadd36df6af.png)


![Owned](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88f5126d558977b43d067b088df25cf107fbf2f0.png)
->
![Un-Owned](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7ef19de650a9b30c1b1d8063973fc53fd03beb7.png)

![New tamed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0720b224ec45942924ca48e84c00e5da5ea4401b.png)



<details>
<summary>Text</summary>

If you have tamed an animal, but you miss-clicked and want to re-pet it? This mod is for you!

</details>
